name: dulus-skills
description: Agentic skills & plugins from Dulus — the multi-provider AI agent harness. Named after the bird, not the rocket.

plugins.name: dulus-autoadapter
plugins.description: Turn ANY Python repo into native agent tools. An LLM reads the library and writes real per-function tool wrappers — a verification gate fails any wrapper that doesn't actually call the library, so you never ship a generic scaffold. Demo: adapts yfinance in under 30s.
